code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
mut stop = false
while i < tokens.len() and not stop
  match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      if n < 0
        stop = true
      else
        sum = sum + n
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
  when None
    stop = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("partial=#{sum}")
